intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual data. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as established specimens. Only P3 (Pothos) is present, indicated by the white rabbit anchor.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos specimen identified by the white rabbit anchor.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant material visible in the shared black pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no growth detected.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no growth detected.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos is present but shows signs of severe etiolation or potential senescence. The specimen is barely visible against the dark substrate.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no growth detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, appears consistently damp/saturated across all pots.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells on the surface of the P3/P4 pot area, likely an intentional soil amendment or calcium supplement.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a faint green sprout in the P3/P4 pot area.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Sprout remains visible but shows no significant growth or postural change.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Sprout appears to be losing turgor pressure; slight darkening of the stem.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Sprout is no longer clearly discernible; potential collapse or burial under debris.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: No visible plant matter remains in the frame; the biome appears to be in a state of total dormancy or failure.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in critical condition. The lack of visible foliage and the disappearance of the initial sprout suggest a failure to thrive, likely due to insufficient light levels (as noted in the biome registry) or root-zone issues.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshells is a notable intervention. The extreme low-light conditions are the primary driver of the observed systemic losses.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image sequence. Initially, a small sprout was visible in the P3/P4 pot, but it progressively lost vitality and vanished by the final observation. The other pots (P1, P2) have remained devoid of visible plant life throughout the duration. The environment is currently characterized by dark, damp soil and a lack of active botanical growth. The white rabbit anchor remains the only constant in the P3 pot.
